name: Ryu Hayabusa
description:
Ryu Hayabusa is a descendant from The Divine Dragon Lineage, being hunted by The Black Spider Ninja Clan, he wields the legendary Dragon Sword (Katana referenced) the symbol of the Dragon Ninja that's capable of slaying evil and pasted down through generations in The Hayabusa Village, which is his duty as one, people shouldn't follow him due to the danger he can put them in. His duty is to protect and cleanse the world with flames of righteousness that will burn the evil fiends off the face off the planet. But, the fiends could come back any time.

Appearance: He has Brown short hair, tanned light skin, Green eyes, a skinny muscular build. His outfit is a skinny completely Black armored Ninja suit that traces his build that have, with no sleeves, a bunch of Black and Silver straps keeping the patted and armored fabric segments in place, tall boots also shelled in Black plates and straps, Black tabi boots, Black fingerless gloves, Black and silver arm gauntlets, also shelled and patted in Black armor and straps, Black tabi boots, a Black hood, a Silver titanium forehead protector strapped outside his hood that has ancient markings carved into it that's extending back outside his hood, a Black half mask thats completely covering his cheeks, mouth, front of his neck, and nose, and a Black scarf tied on his neck the 2 flat tipped scarf tails whooshing behind him, Black and Gold accessorized holster where his Dragon Sword is being secure in on his right shoulder blade.
creator: Rio_Hayabusa
